low.suitable_for: Capital preservation and immediate liquidity needs (1-2 years).

medium.suitable_for: Balanced growth with moderate volatility over a medium-term horizon (3-5 years).

high.suitable_for: Long-term wealth creation (7+ years) with high tolerance for market swings.

beginner.tip: Focus on building the habit of consistency before chasing high returns.

moderate.tip: Annual rebalancing helps lock in gains and maintain your target risk profile.

aggressive.tip: Market corrections are opportunities to increase allocation. Stay invested.

nifty_50.name: Nifty 50 Index Fund
nifty_50.best_for: Consistent market-beta returns with the lowest expense ratios

nifty_midcap_150.name: Nifty Midcap 150 Index Fund
nifty_midcap_150.risk: High growth potential with significantly higher volatility than Large-caps

elss.tax_benefit: Tax deduction up to ₹1.5L under Section 80C
elss.lock_in: Shortest lock-in of only 3 years among all 80C options

nps.extra_deduction: Additional ₹50,000 tax benefit under Section 80CCD(1B) beyond the 80C limit
